name: Easy Buttermilk Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in a large bowl.
2. Add the melted butter and buttermilk to the dry ingredients. Stir until a sticky dough forms.
3. Turn off heat source (e.g., turn off stove).
4. Knead the dough a few times on a floured surface to form a smooth ball.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds using a biscuit cutter or knife.
7. Place the biscuits on greased cookie sheets.
8. Bake at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
